data.title: Registration opens for the 18th Singapore International Energy Week happening from 27-31 October 2025 in Singapore.
data.description: Registration for the 18th Singapore International Energy Week (SIEW) is currently available for the event taking place from October 27 to 31, 2025, in Singapore. Hosted by the Energy Market Authority (EMA), SIEW 2025 will delve into the theme "Envisioning Energy Tomorrow, Building a Sustainable Future." Don't miss out on this prestigious event, with various activities, discussions, and presentations aimed at shaping the future of energy. Mark your calendar and secure your spot to be part of this significant gathering of industry professionals.

data.title: Peter Schiff criticizes Fed for underestimating inflation, says policy is too loose. Fed Chair Powell admits looking through inflation, yet not raising rates. Schiff believes tariffs and loose policy will lead to higher inflation. Schiff suggests need for rate hikes. Fed's decision to ease monetary policy is questioned.
data.description: Economist Peter Schiff has criticized the Federal Reserve for downplaying inflation concerns, claiming that the central bank is not adequately addressing the persistent price pressures. Schiff highlighted Fed Chair Jerome Powell's acknowledgment during a recent press conference that they were disregarding the increasing inflation above targets without raising interest rates as a major concern. He also mentioned President Donald Trump's tariffs as just one of the factors contributing to the anticipated spike in inflation. Schiff argued that the Fed's current loose monetary policy needs tightening through rate hikes to combat the potential inflation surge. This critique comes amidst growing concerns from economists that tariffs and other factors could drive consumer prices higher, necessitating a more cautious approach by the Fed. The full article can be found online.

data.title: Solv Protocol aims to utilize $1 trillion in idle Bitcoin through institutional yield vault with diverse yield strategies.
data.description: A recently established vault aims to utilize idle Bitcoin holdings by employing various yield strategies in decentralized, centralized, and traditional finance sectors.

data.title: Ningjin county in Shandong's Dezhou achieves perfect score in fitness equipment industry, becoming China's top manufacturing base.
data.description: On August 1, 2025, in Beijing, a report states that Ningjin, a small county in Shandong's Dezhou, has excelled in the fitness equipment industry. Referred to as the top scorer if the industry were an exam, Ningjin has shown remarkable growth from its modest origins. The county is highlighted as China's primary manufacturing hub for commercial fitness equipment.

data.title: Propel Fuels wins total of over $833 million in trade secret lawsuit against Phillips 66. Kobre & Kim led the case.
data.description: In a significant legal victory, Kobre & Kim spearheaded a lawsuit that resulted in one of the largest trade secret awards in U.S. history. Based in SACRAMENTO, California, Propel Fuels, Inc. ("Propel"), a trailblazer in renewable fuels, has been granted $195 million in exemplary damages related to the trade secret case.
